title: ASRO Bundle v1
description: Attestation bundle for material AI system change events. ASRO v1.0 — March 2026.

bundle_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this attestation record.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp for when the event was logged (not export time).

system_id.description: Unique identifier for the affected model, service, or deployment instance.

operator_id.description: Identifier for the responsible operator or authorized signing unit.

event_class.description: Exactly one event class from the ASRO v1 taxonomy. Taxonomy is publicly versioned and formally amendable.

state_fingerprint.description: One-way cryptographic hash (SHA3-256 or BLAKE3) of relevant system state. MUST be derived from model or configuration state only. MUST NOT include logs, prompts, or user-derived artifacts.

change_summary.description: Non-sensitive, non-reconstructive summary of the change. MUST NOT contain user data, prompt content, model weight descriptions, or policy threshold values.

impact_metrics.description: Optional aggregated behavioral deltas. If included, MUST be system-level only (not cohort or segment level) and aggregated over a minimum of 10,000 requests. If omitted, anomaly detection capability for misclassification is degraded and this limitation must be disclosed.

policy_version.description: Version reference for the relevant model, policy, or deployment state.

previous_bundle_hash.description: Hash of the prior valid bundle in sequence. Required for hash-chain continuity. First bundle in a chain uses a defined genesis value.

bundle_hash.description: Hash of the current bundle contents.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature from the authorized signing authority under a documented key-management policy.

integrity_assertion.description: Structured operator attestation binding the operator to the ASRO v1 obligations. Must be independently signed. Must be retained as part of the canonical bundle record.

operator_id.description: Operator identifier, matching the bundle's operator_id field.

attestation_timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp of when this assertion was signed.

obligations_version.description: Reference to the published ASRO operator-obligations version in force at the time of signing (e.g., 'ASRO-obligations-v1.0').

completeness_asserted.description: Operator affirms all qualifying events have been submitted.

classification_asserted.description: Operator affirms the event_class correctly reflects the nature of the change.

timeliness_asserted.description: Operator affirms the event was logged within the required submission window (1 hour for EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE; 24 hours for all other classes).

authorized_signer_asserted.description: Operator affirms the signature was produced by an authorized signing authority under a documented key-management policy.

assertion_signature.description: Independent cryptographic signature over this integrity_assertion object. Must not rely solely on the enclosing bundle signature.
